summary: Bootstrap the agentic engineering excellence starter pack with mandatory contract/evidence artifacts, schema definitions, and a CI validator.

behavioral_deltas.description: Introduce contract-first and evidence-first merge policy artifacts and validation tooling.

invariants.statement: Merge blockers are outcome gates and evidence validity, not human-proxy complexity metrics.
Any waived required gate carries issue, owner, and expiry metadata.

rollback.trigger: Gatekeeper causes sustained false negatives for compliant PRs.
rollback.plan: Disable the workflow validation step and revert starter-pack files in one commit.
